name: Nevada City Chamber
notes: Static HTML. Essential Grid plugin events. No Selenium needed.

name: GV Chamber
notes: Static HTML. Elementor page — manually coded events, ~5-10 per month. Chamber meetings, mixers, workshops.

name: KVMR
notes: RSS feed (Tribe Events). Covers KVMR-hosted and community events across Nevada County.

name: Eventbrite Nevada
notes: React-rendered. Filtered to Nevada County locations only.

name: The Union
notes: RSS-first, Selenium fallback. Events behind paywall — RSS often fails.

name: Go Nevada County
notes: DISABLED — site returns 403 to headless Chrome (Cloudflare protection).
